Uses of Class
common.dto.VisitorDTO

Packages that use VisitorDTO
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of VisitorDTO in client.app

    Fields in client.app declared as VisitorDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private VisitorDTO
    Session.visitor
    The logged-in visitor (visitor login-by-ID), or null.
    Methods in client.app that return VisitorDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VisitorDTO
    Session.getVisitor()
    Returns the logged-in visitor, or null if none/staff.
    Methods in client.app with parameters of type VisitorDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Session.setVisitor(VisitorDTO visitor)
    Records a successful visitor login (clears any staff identity).

    Method
    Description
    VisitorDTO
    AuthDAO.findVisitorById(long id)
    Looks up a visitor by their national ID (login-by-ID).
